name: shop-bookseller
summary: A bookseller's shop. Floor-to-ceiling shelves, a sales counter with a ledger, a reading stool or two, and a back room of unsorted stock. Smells of vellum, leather, and dust.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with shelf-lined walls and narrow aisles

primary_palette.note: classic bookseller — shelves dominate, counter tucked to one side
reading-salon bookseller — a lectern invites browsing
disordered bookseller — stacks everywhere, scrolls as well

story_prompts: rare find — a scholar haggling over a grimoire, owner unwilling to sell
quiet browsing — three patrons, owner at the ledger, cat on a stack
book confiscation — inquisitors arriving with a list
midnight visit — shop closed, back shelf open revealing a hidden passage

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm reading light (0.5) — bright enough to read titles on spines

anti_patterns: shelves define every wall — don't leave bare wall space
aisles between shelves must be walkable — don't pack them with piles
never put open flame adjacent to a bookshelf — candles go on tables or counter only
